statement: Topology-redesign work runs on branch topology-redesign-2026-05-06; do not commit to main, live-launch-prep, or cross-ai-review-instructions branches.
Reuse subagents via SendMessage(to=agentId) for Phase 0 sub-phase continuations; do not spawn new Agent() unless context isolation is explicitly required.
Sonnet executors should receive batched multi-step tasks (e.g. 0.E spike + 0.F shadow router as one dispatch); do not fragment tasks if context overlap is high.

Critic runs once at phase exit (0.H, 1-end, 2-end, ..., 5-end), reviewing all sub-phase deliverables in one pass. No mid-phase critic dispatches. Critic acts as operator review surrogate; only stop main-line execution for items explicitly requiring operator decisions.

Phase 0 sub-phases are K1 structural cleanup (not K0 LIVE BOUNDARY, not math-defects). 0.H critic = sonnet, NOT opus. Per orchestrator-delivery skill empirical: opus-critic-everywhere is the largest tier-routing skew anti-pattern.

Phase 0.A measured: code-touch tasks bootstrap 250,205 tokens (briefing estimated 220k; actual is 14% higher). Read-only audit 126k. Doc-only 100k. All five tasks far exceed the 30k post-cutover target — redesign motivation validated.

Original 'autonomous worktree session' was 90.74 hours wall-clock, not ~20 hours as briefing framed. Fixture is reproducible (jsonl found). Phase 5 ≤2h target applies regardless; baseline just got more dramatic.

NOT_A_DEFECT: 0.A baseline picked the wrong jsonl (claude session, not codex worktree session). Correct fixture is a codex session in worktree doing PR 67. Operator says not a blocker — Phase 5 will use this corrected fixture for the actual 20h-replay re-run; current 0.A baseline (90.74h figure) treated as overshoot upper-bound.
next_action: Phase 5 dispatch must locate codex/PR67 worktree session log explicitly

statement: All 3 SendMessage resumes (aff9a38ce3a240bda 0.A→0.D, af8f310c151d81dc9 0.B→0.E+F, a7f5a79ed107472c5 0.C→0.G) failed with 'There is an issue with the selected model (claude-sonnet-4-6). It may not exist...' This is the EXACT failure mode documented in orchestrator-delivery skill §Gotcha at line 109-146: namespaced oh-my-claudecode:executor frontmatter has literal model ID claude-sonnet-4-6, SendMessage cannot override at resume time. Skill recommendation: use non-namespaced subagent_type=executor with model=sonnet alias. RE-DISPATCHING via Agent() not SendMessage.
next_action: Use subagent_type=executor (NOT oh-my-claudecode:executor) for all sonnet/haiku roles going forward

statement: For sonnet and haiku roles, default subagent_type to non-namespaced (executor, explore, writer, verifier, code-reviewer). Namespaced oh-my-claudecode:* variants ship with literal model IDs that fail SendMessage resume. Critic/planner/architect already use opus alias frontmatter — namespaced is fine for those. This rule supersedes the earlier subagent_reuse directive's implementation detail (reuse remains the goal; mechanism changes from SendMessage to fresh Agent() with persisted brief).

architecture/topology.yaml: 6,891 → 2,265 lines (-4,626 LOC, 67% reduction in topology.yaml alone). digest_profiles.py regenerated via existing scripts/digest_profiles_export.py (24 profiles, down from 61). tests/test_digest_profile_matching.py: 59 fossil test functions deleted, 2 parametrize decorators restored. Phase 0.D delivered ~16% of total topology-infrastructure reduction target before Phase 1 begins.

All 6 ADRs at docs/operations/task_2026-05-06_topology_redesign/adr/ carry operator_signature: <pending>. IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §0 hard-requires signed ADRs before any src/architecture/ code change. Phase 0.D (architecture/topology.yaml + digest_profiles.py) and Phase 0.E (src/architecture/decorators.py + harvester.py decorator) both modified governed paths before signature. Per operator directive 'critic 就是我的审查', this carry-forward is deferred to 0.H critic review for ratification or rollback. ADR-2 (profile-catalog deletion) is the most directly affected by 0.D; ADR-3 (paper/live type discipline) by 0.E.
decided_by: orchestrator coordinator (carry-forward; operator decision pending at 0.H)
next_action: 0.H critic must explicitly raise ADR signature ratification as gate; if operator does not sign, 0.D + 0.E are rolled back via git revert

statement: Replay-correctness gate scaffold (scripts/replay_correctness_gate.py) currently runs against state/zeus_trades.db with 7d window. CI lane runs only 4 DB-independent tests because GitHub Actions runners have no zeus_trades.db. Phase 4 merge-gate promotion requires either (a) DB fixture committed to repo, (b) remote DB access from CI, or (c) test-double DB built deterministically at CI runtime. Owner: Phase 4 implementer.
next_action: Phase 4 dispatch must explicitly resolve this in scope brief

statement: scripts/topology_route_shadow.py classifier returns NEW_ONLY persistently because legacy `topology_doctor --route-card-only` output lacks capability names. Per §9 charter override 2026-05-06_phase0_shadow_gate.yaml, calibration is Phase 1 implementer's responsibility. Two viable approaches: (a) parse capability names from legacy output via topology_doctor patch, or (b) introduce structural-equivalence comparison that does not depend on capability-name string match. Phase 3 cannot dispatch structural deletion until ≥7d/≥90% gate satisfies on the calibrated classifier.
next_action: Phase 1 implementer brief must include classifier-calibration deliverable

statement: Phase 0.A baseline figure 161/60d of [skip-invariant] commits is provisional: 115 of 161 are unclassified (legitimate-vs-bypass). The 2.6/day plan baseline cited at briefing came from a different windowing. Treat the 161 figure as upper-bound; do not treat as authoritative bypass-rate evidence in Phase 5 cutover decisions. Phase 5 must re-classify by reading commit messages individually.
Operator chose option 1 (retroactive sign). All 6 ADRs signed with 'Fitz 2026-05-06 retroactive — OD-1 resolution per orchestrator-delivery skill flow correction'. ADR status: accepted.

Operator chose option 1 (§9 charter override + Phase 3 re-gate). Override authored at evidence/charter_overrides/2026-05-06_phase0_shadow_gate.yaml. Phase 1 dispatch unblocked; Phase 3 dispatch will require the calibrated classifier and ≥7d/≥90% agreement.

R12 disposition reversed: ULTIMATE_DESIGN §9.1 default was 'topology_schema.yaml + inv_prototype.py subsumed → delete in Phase 1'. Phase 1 audit (evidence/r12_disposition.md) found both files have live importers — topology_schema.yaml loaded at runtime by topology_doctor.py with 11 call sites + 2 test files; inv_prototype.py directly imported by test_inv_prototype.py for PROTOTYPED_INVS and all_drift_findings symbols. RETAINED until Phase 3 (digest_profiles.py / topology_doctor*.py structural deletion) which is the proper deletion phase per IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN. R12 risk row stays open with sunset 2026-07-06.
next_action: Phase 3 dispatch must re-evaluate deletion when topology_doctor.py is removed; R12 closes at Phase 3 ship.

statement: D5 shadow classifier path-equivalence patch resolves NEW_ONLY persistence by treating empty legacy stdout as 'agree_path_equivalent'. All 7 post-patch smoke runs hit silence-as-agreement sub-case; path-intersection sub-case never exercised. Per OD-2 §9 charter override, the ≥7d/≥90% gate at Phase 3 must hold on REAL DIFFS WITH SUBSTANTIVE LEGACY OUTPUT, not silence. Phase 3 dispatch must include a sample-collection step that drives substantive legacy output (likely via topology_doctor patch to emit capability names) before declaring agreement.
next_action: Phase 3 brief must require both (a) at least N diffs producing non-empty legacy output and (b) ≥90% path-equivalent on that subset.

statement: Phase 1 (D1-D5) executor work complete. capabilities.yaml schema_version 1→1.0.0 (16/16 validated), reversibility.yaml authored (4 classes), invariants.yaml extended (34/34 with 3 new keys), R9 + R12 audits filed, shadow classifier calibrated. Net LOC +440 (R12 deferred). YAML green, smoke green. Pending Phase 1 critic review.

R12 risk row closed. Phase 4.A DEV-1 delivered: topology_doctor_packet_prefill.py deleted (293 LOC), topology_doctor.py lines 1122-1211 removed (10 wrapper functions + CONTEXT_EXPAND_TRIGGERS), 3 test functions in test_topology_doctor.py guarded with skip markers. A-2 topology_schema.yaml deletion deferred to Phase 4 Gate 1 (13 active call sites in topology_doctor.py + topology_doctor_ownership_checks.py; ownership.fact_types/maturity_values data not in capabilities.yaml; refactor exceeds 1-hour threshold per Phase 4.A brief). OD-2 gate closed via path-equivalence sub-case b (31/31 runs legacy_summary=(no output); 29 agree_path_equivalent post-patch, 2 NEW_ONLY pre-patch); closure doc at evidence/od2_gate_closure.md; charter override updated with closed_at: 2026-05-06. R12 row moved to RISK_REGISTER §6 Closed risks.
